source: Heterogeneous Neural Attentive Factorization Machine for Rating Prediction

concepts.finding: Heterogeneous feature interaction model: separate embedding spaces for different feature types (user features, item features, context features). Neural attention weights feature interaction importance. Outperforms DeepFM and AFM on rating prediction. Feature-type-specific embeddings capture richer feature semantics.
concepts.implication: Different keyword feature types (text, frequency, entity, language, domain) benefit from separate embedding spaces with learned cross-type interactions. Attention weights identify which feature interactions matter most for intent prediction.
concepts.open_question: What keyword feature types (lexical, statistical, entity, temporal) should have separate embedding spaces?
concepts.testable_hypothesis: A heterogeneous factorization machine with separate embeddings per keyword feature type outperforms a single embedding space for keyword-intent classification.
